ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Lawrence Mann, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Dulin, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Oscar rodriguez, Jr.
Matter is submitted and taken under submission, proposed Judgment rec'd in court.

Granted as follows:
Damages/Principal $
Prejudgment Interest $
Attorney's Fees $
Costs $, for a total of $
